action_items.action: CRITICAL — Sprint 169 Release Hold. Nebojsa Stanic posted in #publish-gdc at 08:29 BST: '🔊 GDC Sprint 169 release 🔊 🚫 Please hold off on Publishes until further notice. 🚫'. This is the sprint going live today. Find out why the hold was called, whether there is a bug or deployment issue, and what PM action is needed to unblock the release. GDCU-8842 (Integrate Genesis Content Layouts) also updated to In Progress at exactly 08:29 — likely related.

URGENT — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign still Blocked (Day 14). Ciara Carroll is assignee. This has been blocked since 2026-04-16 with no resolution. Escalate directly with Ciara today — determine the specific blocker and whether it requires cross-team intervention. If not cleared today, escalate to Colin Brannigan.

OVERDUE — Ciara Carroll's Claude Design Guidelines announcement (GDCU-8893). Promised 'first thing' on 2026-04-29, but no Slack post has appeared in any channel as of 08:45 BST today. Check with Ciara: has the announcement been posted? If not, when? Mike needs to review, sign off, and publicly endorse across gdc/core-product/language/pod/ai-chatter.

Review and sign off GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Ciara Carroll, Highest, In Product since 2026-04-27 — Day 3). Deliverables: design system tokens, Figma DS Token Exporter plugin, Claude knowledge files (.md), AI Tool Usage Guidelines. Highest priority ticket in the sprint. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Chloe Christie, Gabriel Cornoiu, Eoin McCarthy.

NEW — Review and sign off GDCU-8813 Ace Navigation Assistant UI Audit (Miguel Migneco, In Product as of 2026-04-29 14:53 BST). Scope: audit the Ace Navigation Assistant UI for redundancy after the global nav bar integration — identify which UI elements can be removed or consolidated. Miguel moved this to In Product yesterday afternoon.

REGRESSION — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic) moved from In Product back to In Progress (2026-04-29 10:34). Jessica told Mike she had finished this ticket on 2026-04-28, but it's now back In Progress. Clarify with Jessica: was this bounced for rework? What changed? Outstanding Chloe feedback: confirm logo name/size sourced from Origins.

REGRESSION — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic) moved from In Product back to In Progress (2026-04-29 08:51). Mike was happy with Jess's Figma designs but hadn't formally signed off. Now back In Progress — check with Jessica whether this is a voluntary revision or a requested change before re-entering In Product.

QA FAILURE — GDCU-8834 Implement Fixes for Cool Tones Update (Harden Thomas Wallace) moved from In QA back to In Progress (2026-04-29 18:31). Something failed in QA overnight. Check what was found and whether it affects the Sprint 169 release.

SPRINT RELEASE — GDCU-8842 Integrate Genesis Content Layouts (Harden Thomas Wallace) updated to In Progress today at 08:29 BST — same timestamp as the Sprint 169 publish hold. This was In Product in yesterday's report. Likely related to the release hold. Investigate with Harden/Nebojsa.

Review and sign off GDCU-8866 Automation Bug Fixing & Refactoring Sprint 8 (Robin John, In Product since 2026-04-28). Sprint 8 automation suite bug fixes and code refactoring. Standard quality review required.

Review and sign off GDCU-8736 Learning Hub Imagery (Ciara Carroll, In Product since 2026-04-28 17:23). Ciara shared a Figma prototype previously and tagged Mike for review. Approve imagery so Carlos Blauth can proceed with GDCU-8733 (Apply Feedback to Learning Hub — still In Progress).

Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco, In Product since 2026-04-23 — Day 7). Mobile-first Betting Tips Hub: live tip cards, sport nav tabs, Matrix widget integration, operator offers module. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Dean Ryan, Dan Smullen, Chloe Christie. Longest-stalled In Product item after GDCU-8619.

Chase GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management (Sanja Budic, In QA, Blocked). No update since 2026-04-23 — now 7 days stalled. Did not appear in today's sprint queries, suggesting no movement. Follow up with Sanja or QA lead.

Check in on GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Created by Mike on 2026-04-28: 'quick ticket, don't spend too long on it.' Two banners: completing additional profile page earns chips, and recent iPhone winner. Confirm Jessica has everything she needs.

Vic Dadson still on sick leave — signed off for a fortnight from ~2026-04-21, expected back ~2026-05-05 (next Tuesday). No Slack messages since 2026-04-21. Plan for her return: data engineering options discussion flagged in previous report. No action needed today unless cover is required.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub UX pre-req ticket still not created. Ticket states: 'The UX ticket (design handoff) must be completed and approved before this ticket is actioned.' Create the UX pre-req or formally validate scope with Chloe and Gab before next sprint planning.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Creative direction needed from Mike before Ciara can proceed. Josh Kerr feedback: needs rethinking — clearer message, less 'gaming' feel. Sign off on direction when bandwidth allows.

CARRY FORWARD — Gabriel Cornoiu stakeholder intake questions (last DM 2026-04-23) still outstanding: (1) 'Other' option in offer ordering dropdown behaviour, (2) 'new OpList' clarification. Respond when opportunity arises.
